target.title: feat: improve account appeal notifications
target.body: ## Summary This PR makes the appeals/moderation path coherent across scanner rejections, account bans, email delivery, and banned-account sign-in UI. - Artifact-level malicious scan results quarantine the submitted skill/plugin version and email the publisher guidance. - Existing clean latest versions stay live; malicious first versions/releases do not publish a public latest. - Artifact warning emails do not include an appeal link; appeals stay reserved for account-level enforcement through Hermit at `appeals.openclaw.ai`. - Account-level bans email the user with a high-level reason and route sign-in failures to a dedicated banned-account page. - Local folder scan uploads are deprecated as a scanner-oracle risk; authors download stored scan results for the blocked submitted version instead. - No hidden blocked-version UI is added in this PR; stored scan report access for blocked artifacts is CLI-only for now. - Duplicate version errors now tell authors to increment the version before trying again. - The `clawhub` CLI package is bumped to `0.20.0` so the scan-download behavior can be published as a new npm release after merge. - Local-auth e2e now covers the full malicious skill retry journey: clean baseline publish, repeated malicious retries, captured emails, autoban, and banned-account UI routing. ## Live Local Proof These screenshots were captured from a live local ClawHub run, not standalone mockups: - Server: `bun run dev` - Local URL: `http://localhost:3000` - UI proof commit: `03bcca63` - Current PR head after main merge, CLI release metadata bump, and local-auth e2e coverage: `12c3129a` - Email preview source: generated from the real `convex/lib/emails.ts` builders, then served through the same local ClawHub Vite dev server at `/__pr-2520-email-proof.html` - Raw proof files: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub/tree/qa-artifacts/clawhub-ui-proof/pr-2520/live-local-scan-download-03bcca63 ### Dedicated Banned-Account Page When a banned account tries to sign in, the app routes to a dedicated page instead of showing a generic login error. The page tells the user the account is banned and sends them to Hermit appeals. **Desktop, live local app** **Mobile, live local app** ### Rendered Moderation Emails Rendered from the actual email builders. This shows the account-ban email is appeal-only, while skill/plugin scanner rejection emails include the stored scan-download command and version-increment guidance. **Desktop email render** **Mobile email render** ## Sample Email Context Artifact-level malicious skill email: ```text Subject: ClawHub blocked a skill version Reason: Static analysis flagged malicious upload patterns. Skill: demo-skill Version: 1.2.3 Download the scan results for the blocked submitted version: clawhub scan download demo-skill --version 1.2.3 Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/clawhub/moderation Increment the version number before uploading the fixed skill. Repeated malicious rejections may lead to account disablement. ``` Artifact-level malicious plugin email: ```text Subject: ClawHub blocked a plugin version Plugin: @scope/demo Version: 2.0.0 Download the scan results for the blocked submitted version: clawhub scan download @scope/demo --version 2.0.0 --kind plugin Increment the version number before uploading the fixed plugin. ``` Account-ban email: ```text Subject: Your ClawHub account was disabled Reason: ClawScan classified the uploaded skill as malicious. Skill: demo-skill What changed: - Your ClawHub account cannot sign in. - Existing API tokens for the account have been revoked. - Published listings owned by the account may be hidden from public view. Appeal: https://appeals.openclaw.ai/ ``` ## Flow Diagrams ### Artifact-Level Scanner Rejection ```mermaid flowchart TD A[Publisher uploads skill/plugin version] --> B[ClawHub security scan] B -->|clean or non-blocking| C[Promote version normally] B -->|malicious| D[Quarantine candidate version/release] D --> E{Existing clean latest?} E -->|yes| F[Keep previous clean latest public] E -->|no| G[No public latest is promoted] D --> H[Email publisher: artifact blocked, account still active] H --> I[Publisher downloads stored scan report with clawhub scan download] I --> J[Publisher fixes locally and uploads a new incremented version] D --> K{Repeated malicious rejections?} K -->|no| L[No account appeal path] K -->|yes| M[Account-level ban email and appeal flow] ``` ### Stored Scan Report Download ```mermaid flowchart TD A[Email names blocked skill/plugin and version] --> B[Author runs clawhub scan download name --version x.y.z] B --> C[CLI calls GET /api/v1/skills/-/scan/download/name] C --> D{Owner, publisher admin, or moderator?} D -->|no| E[Forbidden] D -->|yes| F[Convex reads stored version/release scan artifacts] F --> G[Return report ZIP: manifest, clawscan, skillspector, static-analysis, virustotal] ``` ### Account-Level Ban + Hermit Appeal ```mermaid flowchart TD A[Account is banned: manual, rate-limit, or repeated malicious rejections] --> B[ClawHub sends account ban email] A --> C[Banned sign-in attempt] B --> D[Appeal link: appeals.openclaw.ai] C --> D D --> E[Hermit appeal tool handles account-level review] E -->|accepted| F[ClawHub appeal service unbans/restores eligible listings] E -->|rejected| G[Account remains banned] ``` ## Behavioral Notes - `clawhub scan ./local-folder` now fails before any API request with guidance to upload a version and download the stored scan report. - `POST /api/v1/skills/-/scan` with `source.kind = "upload"` or multipart local uploads returns `410` with the same guidance for older clients. - `clawhub scan download --version ` downloads stored scan results for blocked/hidden submitted versions without enqueueing a new scan. - Plugin downloads use `--kind plugin`, for example `clawhub scan download @scope/demo --version 2.0.0 --kind plugin`. - Stored report downloads are restricted to the owner, publisher admin, moderator, or admin. - Artifact warning emails intentionally do not include an appeal link. - Account ban emails include the Hermit appeal link and do not include scan-download remediation copy. - Rate-limit/manual bans do not get scanner remediation copy. ## Tests / Verification - `PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_AUTH_CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT=anonymous-agent-a260-malicious-flow PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_AUTH_CONVEX_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3400 PLAYWRIGHT_LOCAL_AUTH_CONVEX_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3401 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=4282 bun run test:pw:local-auth -- --project=chromium e2e/local-auth/malicious-skill-ban-flow.pw.test.ts` - passed; publishes a clean baseline, rejects three malicious retries, captures three artifact emails plus one account-ban email, verifies the clean latest stays visible before autoban, and verifies `/account-banned` from the banned auth-error route - `bunx vitest run src/components/DevPersonaFab.test.tsx src/lib/authErrorMessage.test.ts src/routes/-account-banned.test.tsx convex/lib/emails.test.ts convex/users.test.ts --testNamePattern "DevPersonaFab|authErrorMessage|AccountBannedPage|moderation notification email copy|recordMaliciousArtifactFindingInternal|schedules a public-safe ban notification|users.upsertDevPersonaInternal"` - 29 tests passed - `bun run format:check -- convex/auth.ts convex/emailsNode.ts convex/users.ts convex/users.test.ts e2e/local-auth/helpers.ts e2e/local-auth/malicious-skill-ban-flow.pw.test.ts scripts/run-playwright-local-auth.ts src/components/DevPersonaFab.tsx` - passed - `bunx vitest run convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/scan.test.ts convex/lib/emails.test.ts convex/securityScan.test.ts convex/skills.backportLatest.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts` - 519 tests passed - `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src src/cli/commands/scan.test.ts --testNamePattern "cmdScanDownload|rejects local"` - passed - `bunx vitest run -c vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/clawhub.e2e.test.ts --testNamePattern "cli scan rejects local folders|cli scan download fetches"` - passed - `bun run ci:e2e-http` - passed - `bunx tsc --noEmit` - passed - `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit` - passed - `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit` - passed - `bunx vitest run convex/lib/emails.test.ts` - 6 tests passed on the final tree - `bun run ci:static` - passed on the final tree - `npm view clawhub@0.20.0 version` - confirmed `0.20.0` is not published yet - `node scripts/clawhub-cli-npm-release-check.mjs --tag v0.20.0` - passed - `node scripts/extract-changelog-release.mjs --tag v0.20.0` - passed - `bun install --frozen-lockfile` - passed - `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub verify` - 27 source test files, TypeScript build, package build, and 7 artifact tests passed - `git diff --check` - passed
